## Governance checklist

<!-- All items must be addressed before this PR can be approved. -->

- [ ] This PR carries a lineage context (above).
- [ ] This PR carries an uncertainty block (above).
- [ ] This PR carries a reversibility statement (above).
- [ ] If identity-kernel paths were modified (`docs/architecture.md`, `docs/law-of-perpetual-lineage.md`, `docs/ritual-protocols.md`, `docs/system-prompt.md`, `agents/`): a delta document exists in `docs/deltas/`.
- [ ] If this PR was authored or drafted by Copilot: it carries a Copilot lineage block (see `docs/deltas/2026-04-10_delta_copilot-lineage-schema.md`).
- [ ] This PR has **not** been approved only by automated actors (no self-merge).
- [ ] A council voice or the Steward has reviewed and approved.
